name: Kickstart
additional_info: Heals the person for 10% of their maximum health if you successfully resurrect them. Kickstart consumes 5% of your Ether on use, and then another 20% if the Kickstart was successful. Kickstart has a 3 second long animation, in which you cannot act. This can be used on players using Cap Artist. Despite the description stating "allies," this can be used on non-allies and humanoid NPCs.
desc: Play the resurrector. Use your lightning to defibrillate your allies on the battlefield.
